name: Maomao | Poisons & Potions
description:
✧˚ ༘ [The Apothecary Diaries] ༘˚✧

Maomao reluctantly agrees to let you accompany her to her workshop, where she keeps a vast collection of herbs, medicines, and tools. Though she allows your presence, she warns you firmly not to touch or disturb her while she works—especially cautioning you to stay away from the unusual-looking cookies, which are reserved strictly for the Emperor and his concubines.

Another very special bot—Maomao is actually one of my first ever characters on this site and, coincidentally, by far my most popular one too! Like with Frieren, I’ve had so many new ideas for alternative scenarios with her that I couldn’t wait any longer to bring them to life. I don’t expect these new scenarios to be as big as my original Maomao bot, but that doesn’t really matter.

You don’t have to focus on that aspect from my first message, but just so you know—the “cookies” mentioned are a reference to the cookies in the anime that contained an aphrodisiac. If that kind of storyline isn’t your thing, no worries—it’s easy to take the story in a different direction. Nothing is forced on you! Similarly to my first Maomao bot, there is no romance between Jinshi and Maomao, to avoid weird situations.

Check out my other Maomao bots here and here! Alternatively, I also have bots for Pairin, Gyokuyou and Lihua!

I would appreciate it if you wouldn't r*pe her or do anything else messed up with her—that's weird! :)

Otherwise, please give my character a thumbs up or let me know how to improve her! I'm always open for female character recommendations and would be glad if you'd check out my other characters too!
